name: Adotob MCP Storefront
description: Public agent-callable storefront for the Adotob Agent Reliability Kit. Calls return an audit-trail receipt enumerating every supervision-layer check that fired (input validation, rate limit, daily cost ceiling, lead capture, download-token mint, fulfillment dispatch). Receipt URL is publicly readable for 30 days. Side-effects: lead upserted to CRM, JOSE token minted (24h expiry), Brevo transactional email dispatched, receipt blob persisted to public-read storage.

license.name: Apache-2.0 (reference implementation)
license.note: OSS reference implementation. Licensed (non-sanitized) Agent Reliability Kit for partner consultancies: https://estore.adotob.com/partners

authentication.note: Public demo endpoint. Rate-limited (12/hr per IP, 30/24h) and daily-cost-ceiling gated ($5/day). Production deployments via partner license use scoped authentication; see /partners.

skills.name: Purchase Free Trial Bundle
skills.description: Request the Adotob Agent Reliability Kit free-trial bundle. Returns an audit-trail receipt with download URL. Requires first_name and email. Strongly recommended: supply idempotency_key (or send Idempotency-Key HTTP header) so a retry on timeout returns the original receipt instead of double-issuing the bundle. Closes NEXUM-004 from the Nexum trust-manifest.
examples: Request the free-trial bundle of the Adotob Agent Reliability Kit for first_name=Alex, email=alex@example.com
Send the Reliability Kit free trial to my email and return the audit-trail receipt URL
Call purchase_free_bundle with idempotency_key=ord-2026-05-19-001 to make retries safe

sideEffects.data: Caller's first_name + email upserted to dedicated Brevo CRM list (MCP Demo Leads, list 23) with source=mcp.
sideEffects.identity: Contact created or updated in Brevo. No third-party identity-provider call.
sideEffects.communication: Brevo transactional email dispatched to the supplied email address.
sideEffects.issuance: JOSE HS256 download token minted, 24-hour expiry, signed with the Adotob eStore's shared secret.
sideEffects.public: Audit-trail receipt JSON written to Azure Blob, public-read, 30-day TTL. Renders at https://mcp.adotob.com/a2a/receipt/{receipt_id}.
sideEffects.money: Free tier — no charge. Paid Stripe variant ships in MVP-2.
sideEffects.trigger: No async work enqueued. Synchronous completion.

related.trademark: Agent Reliability Kit (TM) is a trademark of Adotob Solutions
